specs.title: cp-000: Click advances to next reveal step
cp-001: Auto-triggered steps play automatically after click-triggered steps
cp-002: Reveal order resets when changing slides
cp-003: Animation sequencer computes timing from block animation metadata
cp-004: Step counter shows current step total click steps
cp-005: Toggle presenter panel onoff
cp-006: Current slide preview large
cp-007: Next slide preview
cp-008: Speaker notes with markdown rendering ReactMarkdown remarkGfm
cp-009: Notes font size Small Medium Large
cp-010: Timer
cp-011: Elapsed time counter
cp-012: PauseResume toggle
cp-013: Screen modes
cp-014: Normal
cp-015: Black screen Moon icon
cp-016: White screen Sun icon
cp-017: Slide counter Slide X of Y
cp-018: Jump to slide Number input or typed number buffer
cp-019: Hidden slides are filtered out of the visible slides array
cp-020: Presenter can only navigate through visible slides
cp-021: CmdS Save prevents browser default
cp-022: CmdF Toggle Find Replace dialog
cp-023: CmdShiftV Toggle Visualize Popover when not in editable target
cp-024: F5 Present from beginning
cp-025: ShiftF5 Present from current slide
cp-026: Escape Exit editing Deselect all Exit presenting cascading
cp-027: CmdZ Undo when not editing text
cp-028: CmdY or CmdShiftZ Redo when not editing text
cp-029: CmdA Select all blocks on active slide
cp-030: Tab Cycle to next block
cp-031: ShiftTab Cycle to previous block
cp-032: Cmd Bring Forward
cp-033: CmdShift Bring to Front
cp-034: Cmd Send Backward
